title: Careers at FlyAir
heroImageAlt: FlyAir Careers wall in a modern office showing open Flight Dispatcher, Revenue Analyst and Airline Operations Lead roles
intro: Help travellers across Sri Lanka and beyond plan, book and enjoy their journeys with confidence. We are a small, hands-on team building a modern travel experience under the Travellers Marketplace umbrella.

sections.p:
You will work on a customer-facing product that is used every day to plan real journeys. We value clear communication, ownership of your work end-to-end, and steady craftsmanship over short-lived shortcuts.

We operate as small squads with direct access to operations, customer-service and senior leadership, so feedback loops are short and the work you ship reaches travellers quickly.

A typical week mixes deep focus time with short stand-ups and supplier coordination. We invest in documentation, test our changes against real bookings, and rotate engineers through customer-support shadowing so that everyone stays close to the people we build for.

We are most often recruiting for: travel consultants (English + Sinhala or Tamil), customer-experience specialists, full-stack engineers (Angular + .NET), product designers, and visa-services advisors. Branch roles in Colombo, Kandy, Nuwara Eliya and Kurunegala open from time to time.

Competitive salary, performance bonus, EPF/ETF, medical cover and statutory leave. Real travel discounts on personal trips (flights, hotels, tour packages) through our supplier network, plus an annual learning budget for courses and conferences relevant to your role.

Send your CV plus a short cover note (a paragraph is enough) to info@flyair.lk with the role title in the subject line. If we think there is a match we will get in touch within five working days to schedule a first conversation.

If there is no live role that fits but you are interested in joining the team, we welcome speculative applications — please tell us what kind of work you are looking for.
